title: limonium scabrum
intro: Limonium scabrum, also known as rough sea lavender, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant native to the coastal areas of the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium scabrum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and wound-healing properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
